_note: On-site daily log for ZABAL Gamez. Newest day first. Mirrors the Year of the ZAO newsletter; add one entry per build day.

updates.title: Cassie on Snapchain and building on Farcaster
updates.body: Day 3 goes deeper on the builder track. Cassie breaks down Snapchain and what it means for anyone building on Farcaster - how the pieces fit and what to do with them. 4-5pm EST, livestreamed and recorded.
updates.mindful: Always Do Your Best. You do your best because you want to do it, not to please the Judge and not to please anyone else.

updates.title: Ohnahji opens the creator track
updates.body: Ohnahji on his journey in live streaming - how to start and grow your own stream. The first creator-track session of the season.

updates.title: Season 1 begins - yerbearserker and Bonfire
updates.body: Insert Coin. yerbearserker opened on Empire Builder - leaderboards, Empires, and the message to build the foundation before you rush. Then Joshua and Plat0x walked through Bonfire and the ZABAL Bonfire bot. Two live builds, a strong first day.
